programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: Queen Of The Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attaché for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: That's What I Am
programme.desc: In 1965, 13 y.o. paperboy Andy's paired up with a geek on a project in the popular junior high teacher's class. Andy learns and grows from it.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic - $6.2 Million Pot
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion Kevin Eyster remains the chip leader. He competes against Bill Jennings and Ben Yu for the lion's share of the $6.2 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour concludes with the Monster WPT Tournament of Champions from the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino in Hollywood, FL.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $200/$400 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: WPT High stakes cash is back as season 19 kicks off with a bang.

programme.title: Naked as Nature Intended
programme.desc: Naked As Nature Intended sees four young beauties enjoying the sights of the West Country while exploring the joys of nudism. A nudie-cutie feature from the early days of naturism!

programme.title: Vampyr
programme.desc: A drifter obsessed with the supernatural stumbles upon an inn where a severely ill adolescent girl is slowly becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Zelig
programme.desc: Leonard Zelig's neurotic insecurity forces him to mimic whomever he's with. Treated by Dr. Eudora Fletcher, Zelig is cured. But when misdeeds from his past resurface, Zelig is on the run, and Eudora must search the world over to find and save him.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: People accuse their loved ones of being emotionless impostors. At first, Dr. Bennell tries to convince them they’re wrong, but they’re not. Plant-like extraterrestrials have invaded Earth, taking possession of their souls while they sleep.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: After being released from prison after serving 13 years for manslaughter, AJ’s dreams of living a pleasant crime-free life soon come to an end when he discovers his closest childhood friend Jack, has been marked for death.

programme.title: Loophole
programme.desc: When architect Stephen Booker loses his partnership, he finds jobs hard to come by, and with money in short supply, he unwittingly becomes involved in a daring scheme to rob one of London's biggest bank vaults.

programme.title: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: An international crime novelist is the primary suspect in the disappearance of a young woman and it's up to Detective Mary Anne Cooper to piece together this bizarre missing person's case.

programme.title: The Wrong Life Coach
programme.desc: A woman who hires a life coach discovers that she isn't what she seems.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: The International Space Station is now a prison - the ultimate black site. But when the imprisoned terrorists take over the Station and turn it into a missile aimed at Moscow, only a shuttle pilot and a rookie doctor can stop them.

programme.title: Space Raiders
programme.desc: A futuristic, sensitive tale of adventure and confrontation when a 10 year old boy is accidentally kidnapped by a spaceship filled with a motley crew of space pirates.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A United States Navy destroyer escort participates in a Navy "invisibility" experiment that inadvertently sends two sailors forty years into the future. Starring: Michael Paré, Nancy Allen, Eric Christmas

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Big Deal
programme.desc: When a power failure leaves Rankin Inlet exposed to the brutal northern elements, captain Justin races to deliver an emergency generator.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: On the Move
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Coming Home
programme.desc: In Alberta, Beat is tasked with building one man’s dream home on the picturesque farmland where he grew up.

programme.title: Timber Kings: It’s a Dirty Job
programme.desc: A reluctant Joel joins forces with his wife to construct a backyard obstacle course that he hopes will prepare them for one Tough Mudder of a race.

programme.title: York Witches Society
programme.desc: When an elite society unleashes an ancient evil upon the world, a young woman, the descendant of witches, must use her powers to save them all.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: The Case for Christmas
programme.desc: A lawyer finds himself defending Santa Claus in the biggest trial in history.

programme.title: A Belgian Chocolate Christmas
programme.desc: Photographer takes her best friend's place at a Belgian culinary school at the holidays and connects with the chocolateir leading the class. As romance begins to bloom, the only problem is a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Best of FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: A showcase of the tournament's top goals, assists, and award-winning moments from Spain 1982.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Italy and Argentina played at Stadio San Paolo, Naples on Tuesday, 3 July 1990 at 20:00 (local time).

programme.title: 1994 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Giants Stadium in East Rutherford hosts a match between Bulgaria and Italy; this replay captures the events of the game from July 13, 1994.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A silent alarm leads Andy and Swarek to the discovery of an illegal warehouse party and to an injured John Doe; a homeless squatter who has been the victim of a brutal stabbing; 15 division works to contain the teenagers to the scene for questioning.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Nick and Oliver embarrass 15 Division when they're surprised by a pair of gunmen and end up losing the key witness in an upcoming mob trial; with no leads, all hope seems lost for the police until a man comes in off the street with vital information.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A grad student goes missing, Andy and Nick's search reveals the young woman was leading a double life as a high-end escort; the police discover that another escort also went missing a month ago, a pattern begins to emerge.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The same night the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence, Andy and Gail are violently assaulted in Andy's loft and Gail is abducted; Detective Luke Callaghan is brought in to oversee the case.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony travels along the first 50 miles of the iconic Liverpool-Leeds canal to Wigan Pier, uncovering some extraordinary Georgian and Victorian stories along the way.

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson winds back the clock to 1940 for a walk along Dorset's Jurassic Coast, revealing the county's World War II role as the frontline against Hitler.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Camille inherits a fortune and a prized '57 Cadillac. When she takes it in to a mechanic, one of the most alluring men she's ever seen, her past and present merge emotionally and sexually in the unlikely surroundings...

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Corey, a burned-out photojournalist sent to cover the L.A. sex scene, meets a high-class call girl who fascinates him. Suddenly, she participates in actions she's only ever photographed before, forcing Corey to feel in a way he'd forgotten.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: Moesha reports on the annual school “ditch day”, but will not reveal who attended or who her sources are.

programme.title: Moesha: Mentor
programme.desc: Moesha is sentenced to do errands for an old woman who lives down the block because she stole oranges from her tree.

programme.title: Moesha: Hakeem’s New Flame
programme.desc: Hakeem gets a girlfriend, making both Kim and (surprisingly) Moesha jealous. They conspire to break up the romance, resulting in a heart broken Hakeem.

programme.title: Moesha: Baby Love
programme.desc: Frank and Dee announce they want to have a child of their own, surprising Moesha and causing Miles to run away.

programme.title: Moesha: Women Are From Mars Men Are From Saturn
programme.desc: Moesha is off visiting cousins out of town. Meanwhile, Dee thinks Frank is spending too much time with “the boys” including his brother Bernie.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Whittingdon Castle
programme.desc: The ghost of a drowned soldier awaits Yvette and her team of paranormal experts as they tackle the hauntings that plague this once magnificent castle.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Halsham House
programme.desc: Nestled into the British countryside is Halsham house where a poltergeist hides in wait for the team with frightening effect. With bones found in the attic have the team pushed it too far.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Mansion House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her fearless team to a onetime house, onetime museum and now a care home to investigate the strange goings on reported by staff and guests alike. It doesn’t take long for Yvette to regret her decision to go it alone in the cold dark cellar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bon Voyage, The Man in the Model T, The Scoop, Angel on Board, Buenos Dias.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Moonstruck Beach, Healing Hands, Aspen Sunny Side, Night Walker, Hot Car.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Messages From Beyond
programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Face to Face With Evil
programme.desc: Watch a woman battle a predatory ghost, and see a couple’s shocking discovery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: Meet people who been haunted and hurt by real demons in terrifying nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Living Nightmare
programme.desc: Angela, a newlywed, is excited to start her new life with Stephen when nightmares that she experienced as a child suddenly resurface. Soon the menacing old hag from her dreams terrorizes her daughter and takes temporary possession of her son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Love Curse
programme.desc: When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: William Walker was a firefighter and paramedic with a reputation for helping strangers. Little wonder that debt-ridden Uloma Curry was attracted to him. Within weeks of their wedding she was plotting to get her hands on his cash.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Micah Rine's family had a bad feeling about Thomas Pate. He seemed inauthentic. He had a troubled past. But nothing could persuade Micah that he wasn't the man of her dreams. By the time Micah realised Thomas had a dark side, it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rod Covlin met Shele Danishevsky at a Jewish singles night. She was older, successful and rich, and Rod was happy to live off his wife. After her mysterious death, it seemed he would stop at nothing to get his hands on her money.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the moment she set eyes on co-worker Charlie Stephens, Kirstin was determined to have him; never mind his 40-year marriage. She seduced him, and in doing so set her husband on the path of financial ruin, deception, and ultimately murder.

programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.

programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale
programme.desc: It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: The World Record/The Cave
programme.desc: Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Rides The Bandwagon/Dad's Dessert Dilemma
programme.desc: Woogles have their own names and personalities and they're so darned cute! And Arthur's gotta have one, especially now that everyone is collecting them. Arthur wouldn't mind if Dad's infamous dessert "experiments" remained a family secret.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball
programme.desc: For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up/The Long, Dull Winter
programme.desc: Arthur just might make it to Happy Crazy Wow Day at the park--if he and D.W. can work together to clean their rooms! Then, Arthur and the gang realize they are suffering from the January doldrums brought on by an acute lack of holidays.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Exporting Cuba’s Revolution
programme.desc: Exporting Cuba's Revolution: After the Cuban revolution, Fidel Castro looked to exert his influence in Venezuela. Is Cuba still in charge of Venezuela's future?

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Explore the men in charge whose rampant egos and misguided belief in their own abilities led to their country making fatal mistakes in the war.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: The Special Operations Executive, precursor to MI6, used a foul-smelling substance called 'S liquid' to undermine German and Japanese officers.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: The Invasion of Grenada
programme.desc: The Invasion of Grenada: In 1979, Maurice Bishop takes control of Grenada. Four years later, he is assassinated. Is this another case of the US using its might to stop Communism?

programme.title: Killer Asteroid

programme.title: Our World is on Fire

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Chase
programme.desc: Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When the dinos discover a bunch of animals run amok all over Megalopolis, they wonder why these animals have fled from the woods and entered the city. Kane figures that Skor must have something to do with it.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slaybells / Smells Like Holidays
programme.desc: The kids almost ruin the biggest monster holiday of the year!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Adventures in Bottomland / Golem My Way?
programme.desc: During an unfair polo match, McGee falls down an armadillo and wakes up in 'Bottomland.'

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.desc: People accuse their loved ones of being emotionless impostors. At first, Dr. Bennell tries to convince them they’re wrong, but they’re not. Plant-like extraterrestrials have invaded Earth, taking possession of their souls while they sleep.

programme.title: The Return of Captain Invincible
programme.desc: In WWII, Captain Invincible used his powers against the Nazis, and was a hero. But when they accused him of supporting the Communists he retired to Australia. Now, after a super weapon is stolen he's asked to help. Unfortunately, he's an alcoholic now.

programme.title: The Astral Factor
programme.desc: A police detective (Robert Foxworth) with a joking wife (Stefanie Powers) tries to catch a strangler who can make himself invisible.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: After being released from prison after serving 13 years for manslaughter, AJ’s dreams of living a pleasant crime-free life soon come to an end when he discovers his closest childhood friend Jack, has been marked for death.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: Company K
programme.desc: World War I troubled veteran Joe Delaney attempts to compile a history of his U.S. Marines company but nightmares about the German soldier he killed haunt him still.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: The Wrong Life Coach
programme.desc: A woman who hires a life coach discovers that she isn't what she seems.

programme.title: Love You To Death
programme.desc: Talented attorney Yasmine Winter freezes in court, and her mistake allows a murderer go free. Her boss orders her to take a sabbatical but secretly, Yasmine plans to use the time away to rebuild the case she just lost.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: Starring Megan Park, David Charvet, and Boti Bliss. When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer - even it means putting getting his girlfriend involved.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A United States Navy destroyer escort participates in a Navy "invisibility" experiment that inadvertently sends two sailors forty years into the future. Starring: Michael Paré, Nancy Allen, Eric Christmas

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Timber Kings: It’s a Dirty Job
programme.desc: A reluctant Joel joins forces with his wife to construct a backyard obstacle course that he hopes will prepare them for one Tough Mudder of a race.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Peter helps restore a Manitoba couple’s love for logs by building a home to replace the one they tragically lost to fire. Meanwhile, the renovation of a neighborhood bar nearly drives Bryan Jr. to drink.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Frying Pan into the Fire
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. whips up an outdoor kitchen before hitting the beach in search of the ultimate driftwood bar.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Going for Gold
programme.desc: Joel takes on the mother of all builds – a 20,000-sq./ft. Pennsylvania mansion complete with walk through tree, hand-carved totem pole and 3-story spiral log staircase.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Take to the Trees
programme.desc: Peter may have met his match when he builds a mountainside ski cabin for a client experienced in log-home building.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Beat builds a lottery winner’s 7,000-sq.ft. dream home in northern Alberta. Meanwhile, Peter must beg, borrow and steal to deliver on two high profile entryways for Canada’s Winter Games.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow on the Screen
programme.desc: Peter must board a vessel to rescue a sailor who wants to defect. However, a trap has been set using radar to detect the Invisible Man on a TV screen.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Mink Coat
programme.desc: While vacationing, Peter's sister becomes convinced that the inner-lining of an airplane passenger's fur coat is being used for smuggling purposes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Locked Room
programme.desc: Peter must infiltrate an embassy to rescue a Russian scientist who wants to defect and has been working to solve the problem of invisibility.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Jail Break
programme.desc: Peter vows to help an innocent men unjustly sentenced to prison for a crime he didn't commit and must find the real thief.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Bank Raid
programme.desc: Kidnappers abduct Peter's niece and hold her ransom for $50,000. To get her back safely, Dr. Brady is forced to steal the money from a bank vault.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Odds Against Death
programme.desc: A gangster forces one of Peter's staff to developed a mathematical system to win at the roulette table.

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: Dognapped: Hound for the Holidays
programme.desc: An assistant of an influencer and a charming vet bond to find a missy puppy before Christmas.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: 1994 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Giants Stadium in East Rutherford hosts a match between Bulgaria and Italy; this replay captures the events of the game from July 13, 1994.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The same night the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence, Andy and Gail are violently assaulted in Andy's loft and Gail is abducted; Detective Luke Callaghan is brought in to oversee the case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division struggle to come to terms with their fallen colleague and get back to work patrolling the streets; they discover that a police laptop containing sensitive information has been stolen.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Nick are called to the scene of a van that's been torched, to discover that it belongs to Father Jean Pierre a street priest who's been receiving death threats from the local drug kingpin; priest is reluctant to accept the officers' help.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: With the senior officers off on another assignment, the rookies of 15 Division are on their own; a seemingly innocuous shift leads to a frenzied night in the station when an improperly searched prisoner pulls a gun on Chris in cells.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.desc: After getting stonewalled by Cat in his quest to track down a suspected beast, Gabe enlists Vincent’s help, but Vincent quickly takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat gets a blast from the past as she attends her high school reunion, where she uncovers more of her past than she ever anticipated.

programme.title: Matlock: Christmas Show
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Body
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Reunion
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock: The Umpire
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock: Investigation (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Though diamonds may be forever, Connery wasn’t. The producers need a new star and their choice revolutionizes the character. Embracing the cultural changes of the 70s takes Bond to new heights, but for one producer it would be the end of an era.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With an aging actor in the lead and a new director in charge, the Battle of the Bonds divides the franchise before a new gritty take on the character nearly drives it to ruin. But it's the studio that threatens to deliver the finishing blow to Bond.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Buena Vista Social Club: Adios
programme.desc: Revisit with the remaining original members of the Buena Vista Social Club and explore their contribution to the unknown history of Cuba.

programme.title: The Sun
programme.desc: Alexander Sokurov's film about Emporer Hirohito's surrender at the end of World War II.

programme.title: El Bulli: Cooking in Progress
programme.desc: Documentary tracing a year in the creative life of legendary chef Ferran Adrià, whose restaurant El Bulli was acclaimed as the world's finest.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: On Mt. Sekigutsu, the demon Seisai turns all things to stone. A brave girl defies him, and the pilgrims aid her in freeing the mountain’s beauty.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shosanpu, a young demon rejected by his parents, practices magic on the pilgrims. His mistakes teach him humility and the meaning of real power.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Lost in the wild, the pilgrims stumble upon Mt. Blue Wolf, home to feral wolf demons. They must survive and uncover the truth behind their arrogance.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A hungry boy tries to steal food from the pilgrims. Monkey sees himself in the child’s mischief and learns compassion through forgiveness.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Troubled by dreams of his dying mother, Tripitaka questions his duty. The journey teaches him balance between love and spiritual purpose.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A small-time gangster (Phillip Pine) warring with a mob boss hires a hit man (James Olson) to kill Ironside.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A mobster (James Drury) recognizes an officer assigned to infiltrate a ring stealing credit cards.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Neophyte policewoman Fran Belding tips the police's hand in a crackdown on gamblers. Guest star: Bobby Darin.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The murder of a parole candidate leads to an ex-newspaperman and a beautiful spirit medium (Barbara Rush).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The probe of an officer's death uncovers a connection between the widow (Vera Miles) and a hostile boy.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Informant
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey run into an issue with their drug investigation when it turns out that their teenage informant is a perpetrator of the crimes himself. They are then faced with the dilemma of releasing a one criminal in order to arrest another.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Matinee
programme.desc: When a missing housewife turns up dead, her husband enlists the help of the 14th precinct to solve her murder. As Cagney and Lacey investigate, they discover that the woman is from Cagney's hometown, revealing a glimpse into Cagney's past.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Killers Dozen
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey become frustrated when a patrolman's strike forces them back into uniform and out onto the streets. Both women would prefer to be working on solving the homicide case they had been investigating.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Victimless Crime
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) must investigate the death of a porno film star who died during a film production. However, their investigation is hindered by the victim's costar, who is reluctant to become their star witness.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Bounty Hunters
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are on the search to arrest a wanted criminal who has jumped bail. As they search for the man, they run into a bounty hunter named MacGruder (guest star Brian Dennehy), who is looking for the same man, complicating matters.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Baby Brokers
programme.desc: After an infant is abandoned, Cagney and Lacey end up deep in the world of underground baby merchants. Meanwhile, Lacey seriously considers adopting the infant. Cagney deals with a new love who doesn't approve of her profession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: On June 17, 1994, a tugboat operator is towing a log boom down the Fraser River from Port Coquitlam when he notices something caught up on one of the logs. Upon closer inspection, he discovers a human body.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Odie finds a genie and is granted his wish to fly. A witch decides Jon will be her husband.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield demonstrates the importance of sound effects. The Wolf convinces the crew aliens have landed.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A ghost takes over Jon’s house. Roy tries for a job on a different show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie trick Jon into not taking a trip on his vacation.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tells how it was the Wright brothers’ cat that first flew at Kitty Hawk.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A cartoonist in ancient times wins the hand of a maiden with the help of a cat looking for food.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield’s neighbor moves out and rent their house to a singer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The Garfield Crime Files examines the cast of the Purse-Snatching Pooches.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon has an auto accident and must deal with mechanics and insurance agents.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: On the Case: The Smallest of Clues
programme.desc: A burned out car and a blood-stained bedroom reveal the chilling murder of a community pillar. Will it be the smallest of clues that lead police to her heartless killer?

programme.title: On the Case: Bound by the Truth
programme.desc: When a retired professor is found murdered, police must figure out whether the victim's son and daughter in law were eyewitnesses or the killers.

programme.title: On the Case: A Thin Disguise
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger ambushes a family as they pull into their driveway. Could the memories of a five year old girl be the key to solving the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Tangled Past
programme.desc: When a daughter investigates her sick mother's death, she begins to wonder if the cause of her untimely end was really murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Dunblane Massacre
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School in Scotland, 15 years ago.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: In 2001, patients in New York and Florida show up at hospitals with mysterious bacterial infections. Disease Detectives are called in and soon discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Linder, an athletic 45-year-old physician collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Thomas Rybinski was treated for suspected meningitis, but his condition worsened. When other patients began to have the same symptoms, doctors had to act fast to save lives.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death
programme.desc: When police discover the lifeless bodies of Sophia Gerardo, four children and a house cat, they suspect ritualistic mass murder. But Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers a reality far more frightening.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Felix Navidad
programme.desc: When Felix learns that his perfectionist mother Meredith (Jessica Walter) cannot host Christmas this year, he goes into a frenzy as he prepares to take over the Unger family Christmas traditions.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In Texas, a husband fails to stop his wife from taking her own life with a gunshot to the back of her head; home surveillance reveals the truth; in Washington state, a man builds a bunker in secret with a diabolical plan for his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: From tropical Hawaii to the frigid waters of Lake Ontario, experts reveal the clues nature leaves behind on a human corpse.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Sophisticated crime fighters map the psychological and physical terrain of multiple murderers.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Criminals are betrayed by the clues their own bodies leave behind.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Insight into high-tech tools that can detect and identify suspects in damaged or blurry audio and video footage of the suspect's voice, the moment the crime took place or the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Michael Hammond – The Fantasist Con
programme.desc: He posed as a playboy, a detective, a top surgeon, millionaire property developer, royal confident and boyfriend of Renee Zellweger.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls. For reasons apparent to the residents, they nickname him after the Scottish Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Who Killed Santa?
programme.desc: In 2001, there are a series of murders of homeless people in Toronto. The latest killing is of a gentle man, well known in the area by residents who nicknamed him Santa Claus.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: The Case: The Stone Cutter (Daniel Roussette)
programme.desc: It all began with the discovery of the body of an old lady in the forest at Pacy-sur-Eure by hunters.

programme.title: The Case: Serial Rapist (Guy Bertrand)

programme.title: The Case: Alone Against All Odds (Philippe Savelli)

programme.title: The Case: The Last Tango (Bertrand Gelineau)
programme.desc: In November 2006, the relatives of Nicole Saada, a woman in her sixties, came to report her disappearance.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Investigative genetic genealogy is used to bring closure to the 1998 cold case murder of a mother killed in front of her toddler.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Cutting-edge DNA science finally reveals the identity of the 'Phoenix Canal Killer' who terrorised the Arizona city in the early 1990s and brutally took the lives of two women.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Advances in forensic science shine a light on a case that went cold for decades, revealing the name of a serial killer who murdered two women in the late 80s in Orange County, California.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, a woman in Rankin County, Mississippi, was kidnapped and raped at knifepoint, but the case went cold for decades until a DNA match from an unrelated crime identified the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Middleton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette and her team are called to a grade II listed building that spans over 900 years in an attempt to uncover the mysterious paranormal activity that is said to occur there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 1

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 3
programme.desc: The concluding part of the teams biggest investigation sees Yvette get the biggest shock of.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Abbey House Museum
programme.desc: Yvette introduces a brand new Most Haunted team member, Watson, a bulldog. This location starts to give up its mysteries as soon as the team arrive and they have go film differently to accommodate a particularly aggressive poltergeist.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
